questions.q: During a surprise appearance at CinemaCon, Paramount CEO David Ellison committed to maintaining a minimum theatrical release window of how many days?
Celebrations erupted in South Korea after what type of escaped animal was safely captured and returned to a zoo following a nine-day search?
In an April 2026 $12.5 million settlement with the state of Nevada, which popular gaming platform agreed to ban adults from messaging children?
Based on research reported on April 16, 2026, how did children with ADHD perceive their own performance on brain-teasing activities compared to their neurotypical peers?
options: They rated the tasks as significantly harder
They rated the tasks as significantly easier

questions.q: In April 2026, Google entered into talks to run custom TPUs inside classified Pentagon environments, but pushed for language prohibiting what specific applications?
According to recent reports, the controversial LIV Golf tour is on the verge of losing its financial backing from which entity?
options: The United Arab Emirates Sovereign Fund

questions.q: Following a high-stakes antitrust trial, a jury found that which major live entertainment company illegally monopolized the primary ticketing market?
According to a study reported on April 17, 2026, how does women's criteria for romantic partners shift when they gain more economic power?
options: Their desire for wealthy partners drops
They prefer partners with lower education levels
Their desire for wealthy partners increases significantly
questions.correctText: Their desire for wealthy partners drops

questions.q: An atmospheric study published on April 17, 2026, discovered that stable pollutants from engine oil and cosmetics make up to 4.3% of organic aerosol mass in the air. What are these omnipresent compounds?
On April 17, 2026, the Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms turned 44 years old. What specific provision did Justice Minister Sean Fraser state he wants to establish guardrails around?
